The sublunar determinism which it (grace) set me free from was: pro-CP involvement & punishment by the US authorities. If I ask, Were there permanent effects? the answer is, Yes; I am free from both, from both sides of that (one) coin. This is how the CP involvement figures, along with the anti-US & esp. fear of the US police. The US wanted my ass; the Soviets my mind & the products of my mind. The Holy Spirit led me through the labyrinth & out — hence the ntaauanlmalDmiato dream about Minos' palace & Arachne's thread. And here's the capper: Why were the Soviets interested in the products of my mind? Because they decided I was politically reliable; i.e. "progressive," on their side. Hence my dire danger, as soon as Lem wrote his S-F piece in '71. ital/My early origins & B.G. showed in my work. Doom city!

Scott pointed out that I couldn't reverse my stance (e.g. by attacking Lem) without "being branded as a reactionary + losing my French- German audiences." so how could I extricate myself? I couldn't . St Sophia had to do it for me. The first step was for me to sense - even to a delusional paranoid mystic [degree?] - a fantastic Soviet threat to one equal to that posed by the US secret Police, + thus had to be done in days, even just hours, + such a violent change (we are talking about a lifetime of being "soft" almost brainwashed ) that a new personality (in me) was necessary, which I thereupon received (for the [duration?]).

The ICC doesn't seem to realize that Christ will not merely be reborn as he was before, the re-establish the lost Gospel; the Second Advent is fulfillment of what was done before, and will be different.

In rereading the ICC DECODED NEW TESTAMENT I discover it is based on a false premise; viz., that the gospels date from the Fourth Century and no earlier, and are therefore cut off by time, space and corruption from the original gospel; but in point of fact John for instance dates from only 30 years after the apostles. What the ICC is is a Gnostic group peddling Gnostic doctrines as the alleged original lost authentic gospel; specifically, you can only attain salvation by esoteric knowledge. "A closed, secret society," as they call themselves, claiming Xtianity to have been that originally (it was not). The original gospel was preached to whoever would accept it, openly; as many were converted as could be.
